prisonerLocation.title: Where is the prisoner you want to visit?
prisonerLocation.findPrisonerLink: If you do not know, you can <link>apply to find the prisoner’s location</link>.

prisonerDetails.title: Prisoner details
prisonerDetails.prisonNumberHelpText1: This is the number given to people when they enter prison.
prisonerDetails.prisonNumberHelpText2: Their prison number stays the same if they move to another prison.
prisonerDetails.prisonNumberHelpText3: You need to ask the prisoner for this information before you can book.

prisonerAdded.title: Prisoner added
prisonerAdded.matchedMessage: The prisoner details you submitted were successfully matched.
prisonerAdded.nextStep: To book a visit for this prisoner, you need to add visitors.

prisonerNotMatched.title: Prisoner details do not match
prisonerNotMatched.noMatch: The prisoner details you submitted do not match anyone at {{prisonName}}.
prisonerNotMatched.reasonNotAtPrison: they are not located at this prison
prisonerNotMatched.checkDetails: You can <link>check the details you submitted by going back to the previous page</link>.
prisonerNotMatched.contact: If the prisoner details cannot be matched, you will need to contact the prisoner to get the correct information before you book a visit.
